body:
## Summary
- Rewrites q020-derived generated true/false referendum variants q257/q258 as direct propositions instead of definition-cleft stems.
- Adds generator, validator, naturalness-pattern, and published-content regression coverage for the old Swedish/English cleft phrasing.
- Updates canonical CSV and static site question bank entries for q257/q258 while preserving semantic/static parity.

## Validation
- `node --test --test-name-pattern 'q020|q257|q258|referendum|folkomröstningar|advisory|That referendums|Att folkomröstningar|generated true_false' scripts/derived-content.test.js tests/content-published-question-types.test.js tests/content-question-sentence-endings.test.js tests/content-static-site-question-bank-parity.test.js`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `node scripts/export-question-bank.js --check`
- `node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check` (semantic parity OK; existing format-only drift remains)
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npx prettier --check lib/content/derivedQuestions.ts scripts/derived-content.test.js scripts/generated-true-false-naturalness-patterns.js scripts/validate-content.js tests/content-published-question-types.test.js site/questions.js`
- `git diff --check`
title: data-integrity: rewrite q020 referendum true-false variants
